courses.title: Full Stack Web Development
courses.summary: Build production-ready web apps with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, APIs, authentication, and deployment.
courses.why: This course is for learners who want a practical path into modern web development. Every module is tied to a portfolio-ready project, so students finish with proof of skill instead of only notes.
eligible: Working professionals switching into software roles
Founders who want to prototype their own product
Anyone comfortable using a computer and learning by building

courses.title: Data Analytics With Python
courses.summary: Learn Excel, SQL, Python, dashboards, and business storytelling through real analysis projects.
courses.why: Analytics is useful across business, product, finance, marketing, and operations. This course focuses on practical problem solving, so learners can turn messy data into decisions.
eligible: Business professionals who work with reports
Anyone interested in data-backed decision making

courses.title: AI Productivity And Automation
courses.summary: Use AI tools, prompt systems, no-code automation, and lightweight scripts to save hours every week.
courses.why: This course helps learners use AI responsibly in daily work. It is built around repeatable systems for research, writing, operations, customer support, and personal productivity.
eligible: Students who want better study workflows

testimonials.name: Ananya R.
testimonials.quote: The projects made interviews easier because I could explain exactly what I had built.

testimonials.name: Karthik M.
testimonials.quote: The data course helped me move from manual reporting to dashboards my team actually uses.

testimonials.name: Neha S.
testimonials.quote: I used the automation lessons to reduce repetitive admin work in my business every week.
